items.summary: Fix the Pay Now button in CartSidebar so it is visible and functional on all devices, including mobile. The button should appear in the cart panel when items are in the cart and trigger the UPI deep link flow. Ensure it is not hidden by CSS, conditional rendering logic, or z-index/overflow issues.

Audit the PaymentPage UPI settings fetch: if UPI settings are missing or empty, display a user-friendly fallback message instead of a blank or broken payment UI, so users always understand the payment state.
